entry.title: Install a certificate via the command line.
entry.content: If you ever need to install a certificate into the OS X Keychain on a remote machine in such a way that Xcode can sign a build with it, then this command is for you. security import /tmp/MyCertificates.p12 -k $HOME /Library/Keychains/login.keychain -P MyPassword -T /usr/bin/codesign This allows you to not get that annoying "Always Allow" dialog the first time you try to use the cert to sign a build.
